description: Retuned weighted scalarization to prioritize activity and toxicity, with secondary stability and lighter developability penalty.
Tried pure four-endpoint rank-product aggregation; it improved only the rank-product oracle and regressed from the current best mean.
Tried a soft threshold-gated multiplicative policy; it boosted the threshold-gate oracle but regressed the mean and rank-product diagnostics.
Tried Pareto-front layering with a linear tie-break; it matched the mean but added complexity and underperformed the current best on NDCG.
